title: Authentication
excerpt: description: Generate and manage R2 API tokens for use with S3-compatible SDKs and APIs. image: https://developers.cloudflare.com/dev-products-preview.png > Fetch the complete documentation index at: https://developers.cloudflare.com/r2/llms.txt > Use this file to discover all available pages before exploring further. You can generate an API token to serve as the Access Key for usage with existing S3-compatible SDKs or XML APIs. This page contains instructions on generating API tokens _specifically_ for R2\. Note that this is different from generating API tokens for other services, as documented in [Create API token](https://developers.cloudflare.com/fundamentals/api/get-started/create-token/).
